item.description: Using Mascot.js in a web page Add the following code to the <head> element in your HTML document: <script src="https://d3js.org/d3.v7.min.js"></script> <script src="https://mascot-vis.github.io/lib/pixi.min.js"></script> <script src="https://mascot-vis.github.io/dist/mascot-min.js"></script> Below is an example webpage demonstrating how to create a multi-line chart using Mascot.js <!DOCTYPE html> <html> <head> <meta charset="utf-8" /> <title>Mascot example</title> <script src="https://d3js.org/d3.v7.min.js"></script> <script src="https://mascot-vis.github.io/dist/mascot-min.js"></script> </head> <body> <svg id="svgEle" style="width: 100%; height: 99%; margin: 0; padding: 0; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; background: white;"></svg> <script> let scn = msc.

item.title: Constants
